normalization.notes: Store encoded Runic text in NFC and preserve rune forms, separators, variant labels, and transliteration. Do not normalize Elder, Younger, and Anglo-Saxon rune values into one sound inventory without course metadata.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: runes, rune names, transliteration values, futhark variant labels, separators, and selected formulaic inscription chunks
segmentation.notes: Digital Runic examples can be displayed left-to-right for v1, but historical inscriptions vary by period, medium, and local convention. Store transliteration and reading-direction notes separately from glyph text.

sources.notes: Runic block metadata for encoded rune inventory and names.

sources.notes: Discovery source for inscription forms and transliterations. Do not ship copied inscription text.
